calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Continued To May-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Linda Reyes, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sheri Gafney, also present, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Robert Williams; Robert Williams III; and Hazel McDade.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1460 Shafter Ave., San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $7,990.00
Attorney's Fees $550.00
Costs $396.30 for a total of $8,936.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel to prepare Judgment, and stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

May 6, 2005
Proposed Judgment received in court, and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Assigned To Trial Court
